'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 78''' was the seventy-eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[June 25]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Danger Zone on [[Blimph]]
*[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]
*[[Lama Su/Legends|Lama Su]]
*[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] - [[Clone military education complex|Clone Commissary]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Tatooine/Legends#Geology, geography, flora & fauna|Climate]]
*Cook Droid [[COO-2180/Legends|COO-2180]]
*[[Yuuzhan Vong]] Weapons
*[[IG-2000/Legends|''IG-2000'']] [[Trilon, Inc./Legends|Trilon]] [[Aggressor assault fighter/Legends|Aggressor Assault Fighter]]
*[[Imperial Supply Fleet]]
